milestoneTooltips.PR1:
PR1 — Released 15 Dec 2025
Click to view the PR1 specification

sections.heading: Preview Release (PR)
sections.intro: An early, non-final version of the specification/content made available for:
bullets: Feedback gathering for the technical and product teams

sections.heading: General Release (GA)
sections.intro: A stable, production-ready version of the specification that:
bullets: Has gone through the full review, validation, and approval process
Is intended for widespread adoption and implementation in production

milestoneScopeText.PR1: PR1 focuses on interoperable application lifecycle management between Margo-compliant devices and workload fleet managers, supporting Helm and Docker Compose packaging formats, and excludes device fleet management interoperability and conformance testing tools.

Trust.title: Trust/Authorization
bullets: Strategy for Ecosystem Identity and Authorization
Application image and component signing strategy

Flexibility.title: Extended Workload and Device Flexibility
bullets: Vendors specific extensions(Device capabilities / app requirements)
Target vendor specific runtime via Application
How devices can expose device-specific parameter values to running applications

Robustness.title: Robustness Improvements
bullets: Device roles to capabilities(enables future improvements and flexibility)
